title: mirabilis ciliata
intro: Mirabilis ciliata, also known as the fringed waterwort or fringed loosestrife, is a perennial aquatic plant that grows in shallow water and has distinctive fringed leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Mirabilis ciliata include reducing inflammation, fighting bacterial infections, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Mirabilis ciliata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
